name: claude-team-toolkit
description: Team-ready Claude Code skill pack with 15 integrations spanning service APIs (Trello, Azure DevOps, Heroku, Sentry, Slack, Firebase, Shopify), data ops (PostgreSQL), test/QA (RSpec, Rails security, k6, Maestro, xlsx-testcases), and mobile (React Native, Fastlane). Multi-account profile support, audit logging, security-first defaults. For dev, QA, QC, testers, and team leads.
